data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation BLOCKED — cannot create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory because plugins/dso/scripts/ticket is already a shell script file (8739 bytes, executable). mkdir fails with 'File exists'. Created bug ticket de8a-ed90 to track. The ticket shell script (DSO CLI dispatcher) occupies the path where the Python package directory needs to go. Resolution requires either: (a) renaming the ticket shell script, or (b) choosing a different package name (e.g. ticket_processors/). This is outside sub-agent ownership scope.
